item.title: Projects
item.description: Research Projects Investigating Memory/Type Errors for Real World Programs (Aug 2019 - Present) UROP Project in NUS. Working on the LowFat bounds checker. Improving Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) system for Transcribing High School Lectures (Sep 2015 - Sep 2016) Attachment project in A*STAR, under Dr. Lim Boon Pang. By making changes to the Deep Neural Network (DNN) acoustic model, we improved the ASR system towards captioning Singlish lectures in classroom environment.

item.title: About Me
item.description: Hello! I am an undergraduate student majoring in computer science, interested in programming languages, systems, security and software engineering. You can get a copy of my CV here. Beyond tech, I am also interested in economics, history and Chinese calligraphy. My Life So Far I was born in China and has spent the first 15 years of my life in Tianjin, a beautiful international port city on the east coast of China.

item.title: Why blog?
item.description: It has been one year since I started university and my programming journey. Programming is super enjoyable for me, and I wished I could have started learning programming earlier. Despite being enjoyable, there have also been many hair-pulling moments when I was learning how to program at the beginning. How to implement a BFS, how to write code in functional style, how to quit vim… Believe me, all of these seem easy but they are indeed challenging and frustrating for newbies.

item.title: Home
item.description: CS Undergraduate Student @ National University of Singapore. Welcome to my site! I keep some of my projects information here, and occasionally update blog posts. Here are some of my blogs:
